name: ivan-skill-pack
description: Ivan's Codex plugin bundle with human-UI polish and BaZi workflow skills.

interface.shortDescription: Human UI polish and BaZi workflow skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A personal Codex plugin that bundles Ivan Human UI for removing generic AI-looking interfaces and Ivan Bazi Architect for citation-backed BaZi workflows with local PDFs.
defaultPrompt: Use ivan-human-ui to remove AI-looking patterns from this landing page.
Use ivan-bazi-architect to build a cited SW-1 SW-2 SW-3 brief from my local PDFs.
Show me which of Ivan's bundled skills fits this task best.
